headline: Robinhood Expands to Canada via $180M WonderFi Deal

article.title: Robinhood enters Canada after $180 million WonderFi acquisition
article.summary: Robinhood will enter Canada after its WonderFi acquisition brought local crypto exchanges Bitbuy and Coinsquare under its control.

headline: UBS Issues $1.5B AT1 Bond After Reform Pause

article.title: UBS Offers First AT1 Since Swiss Authorities Paused Reforms
article.summary: UBS Group AG is set to raise Additional Tier 1 capital in US dollars, its first foray into the market since Switzerland paused plans to tighten rules on the riskiest type of bank debt.

headline: India Fuel Exports Drop 30% in May

article.title: India’s Fuel Exports Plunge in May as Domestic Needs Prioritized
article.summary: India’s fuel exports tumbled to the lowest level in nearly four years in May as a push to ensure domestic supplies during the Iran war shock along with refinery maintenance curbed overseas flows.
